Meaning.Vi: phà (tàu chở người và phương tiện qua sông, biển)
Meaning.En: A boat or ship designed to carry passengers and vehicles across a body of water, typically on a regular route.
Meaning.Example: The ferry departed from the dock at 8:30 a.m., carrying 150 passengers and 40 cars.

Situation.Vi: Đi qua sông hoặc vịnh bằng tàu chở khách và xe hơi.
Situation.En: Traveling across a river or bay using a passenger and vehicle transport vessel.

Meaning.En: To transport people or goods across a body of water, typically using a ferry.
Meaning.Example: The company ferries employees between the mainland and the island office every weekday morning.

Situation.Vi: Doanh nghiệp sử dụng phà để đưa đón nhân viên giữa đất liền và đảo.
Situation.En: A business uses a ferry to shuttle employees between the mainland and an island location.

Meaning.Vi: phà (xe điện, tàu điện ngầm chở khách trong thành phố)
Meaning.En: A vehicle, such as a tram or subway car, that shuttles passengers between two points, especially in urban transit systems.
Meaning.Example: The airport shuttle is often called a “ferry bus” or simply a “ferry” in some cities.

Situation.Vi: Xe đưa đón khách giữa sân bay và trung tâm thành phố.
Situation.En: A shuttle vehicle transporting passengers between an airport and the city center.
